productDisplayName: Fossil Women White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: White and silver coloured round case Dial style: White dial with silver and white coloured hands Strap style: White rubber covered strap with hints of silver colour and a butterfly clasp Features: Three chronograph time displays, branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Waterproof to 10 ATM, wearable around sinks and in slight showers Warranty: 2 years
